name: OpenLIT
description: Open-source OpenTelemetry-native observability platform for GenAI, LLM and AI application stacks.

seo.title: OpenLIT — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: OpenLIT: Open-source OpenTelemetry-native observability platform for GenAI, LLM and AI application stacks.

when_to_use: OpenTelemetry observability for LLM and GenAI stacks
Trace token usage, latency, and cost per LLM call
Monitor prompt evaluation quality in AI pipelines
Open-source alternative to Langfuse and Helicone

pros: OTel-native tracing for LLM and GenAI apps
Drop-in with OpenAI, Anthropic, and vector DBs
Avoids lock-in to proprietary LLMOps platforms
cons: UI less polished than Braintrust or LangSmith
Smaller community than established LLMOps tools
review.verdict: Right approach with OTel-native GenAI observability; solid pick if you value open standards over polish.
review.best_for: Teams wanting vendor-neutral LLM observability tied to existing OTel pipelines.
review.not_for: Teams preferring polished managed LLMOps with evals and PM-friendly UX.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
